name: video-producer
description: Plan, structure, and package videos for marketing, product, education, documentary, testimonial, launch, social, and internal communication formats with strong audience-fit, hook design, production realism, edit guidance, and distribution readiness. Use when the main task is deciding what video to make, how it should open, what needs to be shot, how the story should flow, or how to shape footage into a stronger finished piece. Do not use when the main work is graphic design, copy-only writing, motion-only execution, or direct video editing in software.
